summary: Comprehensive testing of Pickle Profit Inventory Management System completed. Backend APIs achieved 100% success rate (13/13 tests passed). Frontend tested across all major user journeys including registration, dashboard, products, sales, customers, reports with excellent results.

integration_issues.issue: Sessions may expire during extended testing causing redirect to login

passed_tests: Navigation between all pages (Products, Sales, Inventory, Customers, Reports)
Products page display with seeded products
Reports page with period selection and export
